title: clerodendrum williamsii
intro: Clerodendrum williamsii, also known as the 'Clerodendrum glabrum', is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to China and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Clerodendrum williamsii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
